title: Command Modification
body:
# Command Modification 指令修改
**Originally /kill /tp /time /weather had the right to use by OP players, but now ordinary players can also use this module to achieve. In 1.2.0+version，You can turn functions on or off in the GUI.The default key is K.Only the first person to enter the room has permission to change it.**

| 原版指令Original Command         | 修改后的指令Modified Command        | 用法use                  |
|:--------------------------------:|:-----------------------------------:|:------------------------:|
| /kill @s                         | /killr                              | 自杀Suicide              |
| /time set day/noon/night/midnight|/timer set day/noon/night/midnight|修改游戏时间Modify the game time|
| /tp <player>                     | /tpr <player>                      |传送玩家Teleport the player|
| /weather rain/clear              | /weatherr rain/clear                |更改天气Change the weather|

**本来 /kill /tp /time /weather 具有op玩家有权利使用，但现在一般玩家也能够通过本模组来实现。在1.2.0版本中你可以在GUI中开启或关闭功能,默认键为K,只有第一个进入房间的才有权限修改。**
